response: The British rock band Dire Straits released the album *Brothers in Arms* in 1985, which also featured a song with the same title, "Brothers in Arms." The album was their fifth studio album and was certified 10-times platinum in the UK, while the song was originally written in 1982, the year of the Falklands War, and re-released in 2007 as a special edition to commemorate the 25th anniversary of the conflict.
